nodes.itemHTML: • pry-railsstars1.3k - Avoid repeating yourself, use pry-rails instead of copying the initializer to every rails project. This is a small gem which causes rails console to open pry. It therefore depends on pry.
• scallopstars638 - A simple Scala CLI parsing library.
• Vue.js - 🛠️ - 🐙stars200k - An approachable core library that focuses on the view layer only.

• Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars41.5k - compiler for writing next generation JavaScript; Babel will turn your ES6+ code into ES5 friendly code, so you can start using it right now without waiting for browser support.

• Sass - 🛠️ - 🐙stars14.2k - Sass is an extension of CSS3, adding nested rules, variables, mixins, selector inheritance, and more. It's translated to well-formatted, standard CSS using the command line tool or a web-framework plugin.

• UralicNLPstars53 - An open source Python library for processing morphologically rich and, for the most part, endangered Uralic languages. It can do morphological analysis, generation, lemmatization, disambiguation and lexical lookup for a great many Uralic languages.

• ievmsstars69 - Automated installer for the free virtual machine images that Microsoft provides for testing on multiple versions of IE. These images can be useful for cross-platform testing various technologies, however make sure you read and understand Microsofts' licensing.
